title: Mob Variations
description: Applies small random variations to most mobs
body:
## Mob Variations

Causes most naturally-spawned mobs to have randomized stats!
</br>Mobs can have edited Size, Movement Speed, Jump Strength, Attack Damage, and Max Health.

These randomizations will apply to﻿ all mobs of any eligible type, including mobs spawned naturally by the world, by spawners or spawn eggs, or with /summon.
</br>To spawn a mob that won't get randomized stats, summon it with the tag "mobstats.ignore".

Stats are randomized between a set of maximum and minimum values. These values are saved in the scoreboard objective "mobstats.range" - to view/alter them, put this objective on the sidebar, and edit the values you see. Any changes will apply to any mobs spawned from that point on, but not already-existing mobs.

To change which mobs can be affected by which stats, you can edit the respective entity_type tags inside the datapack.

Explanation Video [Here](https://youtu.be/n7uhl6Vcplo)
</br>Read more on the [PlanetMinecraft Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/mob-variations-6399395/)
